settings.announcement_text: Premium custom teamwear. Built to represent.
settings.hero_title: Built for programs that show up dressed.
settings.hero_copy: Crossover Culture builds the visual system around a program: reversible sets, basketball uniforms, shooting layers, travel pieces, and daily essentials that carry one standard from arrival to tip.
settings.hero_overlay_copy: Premium custom teamwear built around uniforms, preparation, travel, and the details that make a program look complete.
settings.collection_title: One world. Every collection in view.
settings.collection_copy: Uniforms frame game-day identity. Shooting layers lock in preparation. Travel gear handles arrival and off-court presence. Base layers, fleece, shorts, and accessories fill out the daily program standard.
settings.story_copy: This storefront is built to merchandise the brand first, then move teams cleanly into the right order path for uniforms, shooting, travel, and staff gear.
settings.route_title: Start the right order without breaking the system.
settings.route_copy: The storefront shell elevates discovery, then directs teams into the right order path for each custom category.
settings.footer_kicker: Ready to build the program standard?
settings.footer_title: Stay close to new drops, teamwear launches, and ordering updates.
settings.footer_copy: Use this footer as the support and newsletter anchor for the storefront, with a premium tone and clean route into every major collection.
